# First collect mushrooms from mushmush

fight("Hero")

# Get cowhide from cows
move("Hero", 0, 2)
for i in range(6):
    fight("Hero")

# Get iron ore and make iron
move("Hero", 1, 7)
for i in range(40):  # 8 per iron * 5 iron = 40
    gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 5)
for i in range(5):
    craft("Hero", "iron", 1)

# Get spruce wood and make planks
move("Hero", 2, 6)
for i in range(16):  # 8 per plank * 2 planks = 16
    gather("Hero")

for i in range(2):
    craft("Hero", "spruce_plank", 1)

# Craft Adventurer Boots and Life Ring
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "adventurer_boots", 1)
move("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "life_ring", 1)

# Equip the new gear
equip("Hero", "boots", "adventurer_boots")
equip("Hero", "ring1", "life_ring")

# Now go fight the pig
move("Hero", -3, -3)
fight("Hero")

# I need to determine the minimal setup to beat the skeleton
# Skeleton HP: 480, attacks: 26 fire + 18 earth
# My base HP: 420

# First, let's get the Greater Wooden Staff for water damage
move("Hero", 0, -2)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 2, -1)
fight("Hero")

# Now get spruce wood
move("Hero", 2, 6)
for _ in range(48):
    gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 1, 9)
for _ in range(32):
    gather("Hero")

# Craft spruce planks
move("Hero", -2, -3)
for _ in range(10):
    craft("Hero", "spruce_plank", 1)

# Craft Greater Wooden Staff
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "greater_wooden_staff", 1)

# Equip the new weapon
equip("Hero", "weapon", "greater_wooden_staff", 1)

# Now craft Adventurer Vest to increase HP
# Need 2 feathers, 6 cowhide, 4 spruce_planks, 4 yellow_slimeballs
move("Hero", 0, 1)
fight("Hero")
fight("Hero")  # Get feathers

move("Hero", 0, 2)
for _ in range(6):  # Need 6 cowhide
    fight("Hero")

move("Hero", 1, -2)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 4, -1)
for _ in range(6):  # Need 4+ yellow_slimeballs
    fight("Hero")

# Craft the missing spruce_planks if needed
if (len([item for item in inventory if item.code == 'spruce_plank']) < 4):
    move("Hero", -2, -3)
    craft("Hero", "spruce_plank", 4)

# Finally craft and equip Adventurer Vest
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "adventurer_vest", 1)
equip("Hero", "body_armor", "adventurer_vest", 1)

# Now head to graveyard to fight skeleton
move("Hero", 8, 6)
fight("Hero")

move("Hero", 11, 7)
fight("Hero")

# 1. Move to gold rocks and gather 128 gold ore
for _ in range(128):
    move("Hero", 10, -4)
    gather("Hero")

# 2. Move to mining station and craft 16 gold
for _ in range(16):
    move("Hero", 1, 5)
    craft("Hero", "gold", 1)

# 3. Move to dead tree and gather 24 dead wood
for _ in range(24):
    move("Hero", 9, 8)
    gather("Hero")

# 4. Move to woodcutting station and craft 3 dead wood planks
for _ in range(3):
    move("Hero", -2, -3)
    craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 1)

# 5. Kill 8 vampires for vampire blood
vampire_locations = [(10, 6), (10, 8)]
for _ in range(8):
    move("Hero", *vampire_locations[0])
    fight("Hero")

# 6. Kill 5 demons for demon horn
for _ in range(5):
    move("Hero", 1, 13)
    fight("Hero")

# 7. Kill 4 owlbears for owlbear hair
owlbear_locations = [(10, 1), (10, 2)]
for _ in range(4):
    move("Hero", *owlbear_locations[0])
    fight("Hero")

# 8. Gather 1 magical cure
move("Hero", 3, 6)
gather("Hero")

# 9. Craft Gold Sword
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "gold_sword", 1)

# 10. Craft Gold Boots
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "gold_boots", 1)

# 11. Equip new sword
unequip("Hero", "weapon", 1)
equip("Hero", "weapon", "gold_sword", 1)

# 12. Equip new boots
unequip("Hero", "boots", 1)
equip("Hero", "boots", "gold_boots", 1)

# 13. Move to Cultist Emperor and fight
move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")

code:
# Go to first skeleton location to fight and get bones/skulls
move("Hero", 8, 6)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 8, 8)
fight("Hero")

# Go to second skeleton location if needed (we need 10 bones and 1 skull total)
# After getting bones and skulls, gather other resources

# Go to iron rocks
move("Hero", 1, 7)
for i in range(15):  # Need 15 iron ore for 13 steel
    gather("Hero")

# Go to coal rocks
move("Hero", 1, 6)
for i in range(28):  # Need 25 coal + extra for 13 steel (3 iron ore + 5 coal per steel)
    gather("Hero")

# Go to ash trees
move("Hero", -1, 0)
for i in range(9):  # Need 9 ash wood for 13 hardwood planks (3 ash + 5 birch per plank)
    gather("Hero")

# Go to birch trees
move("Hero", 3, 5)  # Or -1,6 for birch
for i in range(15):  # Need 15 birch wood
    gather("Hero")

# Fight pigs for pig skin
move("Hero", -3, -3)
fight("Hero")

# Fight wolves for wolf materials
move("Hero", -3, 0)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", -2, 1)
fight("Hero")

# Fight flying serpents for wings
move("Hero", 5, 4)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 7, 4)
fight("Hero")

# Craft steel
move("Hero", 1, 5)
for i in range(13):
    craft("Hero", "steel", 1)

# Craft hardwood planks
move("Hero", -2, -3)
for i in range(13):
    craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 1)

# Craft weapons and armor
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "skull_staff", 1)

move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "steel_helm", 1)
craft("Hero", "skeleton_armor", 1)
craft("Hero", "skeleton_pants", 1)

# Equip new gear
equip("Hero", "weapon", "skull_staff")
equip("Hero", "helmet", "steel_helm")
equip("Hero", "body_armor", "skeleton_armor")
equip("Hero", "leg_armor", "skeleton_pants")

# Final calculation shows we now have 40 attack fire + damage bonuses from new gear
# With improved fire damage and HP, we should be able to defeat the ogre
move("Hero", -5, -5)
fight("Hero")

code:
# Start by moving to chickens at (0,1) to get feathers
move("Hero", 0, 1)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")

# Move to yellow slime at (1,-2) for yellow slimeballs
move("Hero", 1, -2)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")

# Move to green slime at (0,-1) for green slimeballs
move("Hero", 0, -1)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")

# Move to blue slime at (0,-2) for blue slimeballs (if any drop)
move("Hero", 0, -2)
fight("Hero")

# Move to flying serpent at (5,4) for flying wings
move("Hero", 5, 4)
for i in range(3):
    fight("Hero")

# Move to cow at (0,2) for cowhide
move("Hero", 0, 2)
for i in range(6):
    fight("Hero")

# Collect iron ore at (1,7)
move("Hero", 1, 7)
for i in range(11):
    gather("Hero")

# Collect spruce wood at (2,6)
move("Hero", 2, 6)
for i in range(32):
    gather("Hero")

# Craft iron at mining station (1,5)
move("Hero", 1, 5)
for i in range(11):
    craft("Hero", "iron", 1)

# Craft spruce planks at woodcutting station (-2,-3)
move("Hero", -2, -3)
for i in range(4):
    craft("Hero", "spruce_plank", 1)

# Craft adventurer vest at gear crafting station (3,1)
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "adventurer_vest", 1)

# Craft air ring at jewelry crafting station (1,3)
move("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "air_ring", 1)

# Equip second air ring
equip("Hero", "ring2", "air_ring")

# Craft iron dagger at weapon crafting station (2,1)
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "iron_dagger", 1)

# Unequip iron sword and equip iron dagger
move("Hero", 2, 1)
unequip("Hero", "weapon")
equip("Hero", "weapon", "iron_dagger")

# Equip adventurer vest
move("Hero", 2, 1)
unequip("Hero", "body_armor")
equip("Hero", "body_armor", "adventurer_vest")

# Move to pig at (-3,-3) and fight
move("Hero", -3, -3)
fight("Hero")

# Move to get resources for Forest Whip and combat gear
# First, gather green_slimeballs by fighting green slimes
move("Hero", 3, -2)
for _ in range(2):
    fight("Hero")
   
# Gather wolf_hair from wolves
move("Hero", -3, 0)
for _ in range(3):
    fight("Hero")
   
move("Hero", -2, 1)
for _ in range(2):
    fight("Hero")
   
# Gather pig_skin from pigs
move("Hero", -3, -3)
for _ in range(4):
    fight("Hero")
   
# Gather ash and birch wood for hardwood plank
move("Hero", -1, 0)
for _ in range(3 * 4):  # Need 3 ash per hardwood, 4 hardwood
    gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 3, 5)
for _ in range(5 * 4):  # Need 5 birch per hardwood
    gather("Hero")
   
# Move to woodcutting station to craft hardwood_plank
move("Hero", -2, -3)
craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 4)
   
# Now craft Forest Whip
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "forest_whip", 1)
   
# Equip Forest Whip
unequip("Hero", "weapon")
equip("Hero", "weapon", "forest_whip")
   
# Now fight the scarecrow at (2,2)
move("Hero", 2, 2)
fight("Hero")

# Move to Graveyard to fight skeletons
move("Hero", 8, 6)

# Fight 1 skeleton for skull and bones

# Fight another skeleton for more bones
move("Hero", 8, 8)
fight("Hero")

# Move to forest to fight wolves, pigs, and flying serpents
move("Hero", -3, 0)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", -3, -3)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 5, 4)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 7, 4)
fight("Hero")

# Move to gather steel crafting materials
move("Hero", 1, 7)
for i in range(15):
    gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 6)
for i in range(25):
    gather("Hero")

# Move to gather wood materials
move("Hero", -1, 0)
for i in range(15):
    gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -1, 6)
for i in range(25):
    gather("Hero")

# Move to mining station to craft steel
move("Hero", 1, 5)
for i in range(10):
    craft("Hero", "steel", 1)

# Move to woodcutting station to craft hardwood plank
move("Hero", -2, -3)
for i in range(10):
    craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 1)

# Move to weaponcrafting station to craft skull staff

craft("Hero", "skull_staff", 1)

# Move to gearcrafting station to craft steel helm
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "steel_helm", 1)

# Move to jewelrycrafting station to craft skull ring and ruby amulet
move("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "skull_ring", 1)
craft("Hero", "ruby_amulet", 1)

# Move to gearcrafting station to craft piggy pants
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "piggy_pants", 1)

# Equip the new items

equip("Hero", "helmet", "steel_helm", 1)
equip("Hero", "ring1", "skull_ring", 1)
equip("Hero", "amulet", "ruby_amulet", 1)
equip("Hero", "leg_armor", "piggy_pants", 1)

# Move to and fight the Bandit Lizard
move("Hero", 4, 8)
fight("Hero")

# Kill 1 Cultist Emperor - need to first gather resources and craft better equipment
# Analyze current stats vs Cultist Emperor
# Current damage: 95/turn, Enemy damage: 152.8/turn - cannot win
# Need to improve water damage and add more HP

# Gather resources for crafting better equipment
# First, let's see what we have in inventory and then move to gather required items
# For Gold Helm: gold(8), demon_horn(2), demoniac_dust(3), vampire_blood(3), owlbear_hair(4)
# For Sapphire Amulet: hardwood_plank(8), sapphire(1), wolf_hair(5), jasper_crystal(2)

# Start by moving to appropriate locations to gather materials and defeat monsters

# 1. Get vampire blood from vampires
move("Hero", 10, 6)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 10, 8)
fight("Hero")

# 2. Get demoniac dust from imps
move("Hero", -1, 12)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 0, 13)
fight("Hero")

# 3. Get lizard skin from bandit lizard
move("Hero", 4, 8)
fight("Hero")

# 4. Get owlbear hair
move("Hero", 10, 1)
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 10, 2)
fight("Hero")

# 5. Get ogre skin
move("Hero", -5, -5)
fight("Hero")

# 6. Get demon horns from demon
move("Hero", 1, 13)
fight("Hero")

# 7. Gather crafting materials
# Gold ore
move("Hero", 10, -4)
for i in range(8):
    gather("Hero")

# Dead wood
move("Hero", 9, 8)
for i in range(6):
    gather("Hero")

# Hardwood planks - need woodcutting station
move("Hero", -2, -3)
# Need ash wood and birch wood
move("Hero", -1, 0)
for i in range(16):
    gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 3, 5)
for i in range(8):
    gather("Hero")
# Craft hardwood planks
craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 8)

# Sapphire and jasper crystals
move("Hero", 1, 7)  # iron rocks for sapphire/ruby
for i in range(10):
    gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 0, 6)  # jasper rocks
for i in range(2):
    gather("Hero")

# Gold bars
move("Hero", 1, 5)  # mining station
craft("Hero", "gold", 8)

# Now craft the equipment pieces
# Gold Helm
move("Hero", 3, 1)  # gearcrafting station
craft("Hero", "gold_helm", 1)

# Sapphire Amulet
move("Hero", 1, 3)  # jewelrycrafting
craft("Hero", "sapphire_amulet", 1)

# Equip new items
equip("Hero", "helmet", "gold_helm")
equip("Hero", "amulet", "sapphire_amulet")

# Check if we need more gear - calculate with new stats
# New setup would give more HP and water damage boost

# Now go fight the Cultist Emperor
move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")

equip("Hero", "body_armor", "obsidian_legs_armor")

# Step 15: Kill Cultist Emperor

fight("Hero")

code:
# Step 1: Mine gold ore
move("Hero", 10, -4)
for i in range(64):
    gather("Hero")

# Step 2: Chop dead wood
move("Hero", 9, 8)
for i in range(24):
    gather("Hero")

# Step 3: Kill vampires for vampire blood
move("Hero", 10, 6)
for i in range(4):
    fight("Hero")
if len(inventory["vampire_blood"]) < 4:
    move("Hero", 10, 8)
    fight("Hero")

# Step 4: Kill death knights for red cloth
move("Hero", 8, 7)
for i in range(3):
    fight("Hero")
if len(inventory["red_cloth"]) < 3:
    move("Hero", 10, 7)
    fight("Hero")

# Step 5: Kill demons for demon horns
move("Hero", 1, 13)
for i in range(2):
    fight("Hero")

# Step 6: Craft gold bars (smelt ore)
move("Hero", 1, 5)
craft("Hero", "gold", 8)

# Step 7: Craft dead wood planks
move("Hero", -2, -3)
craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 3)

# Step 8: Craft Gold Sword
move("Hero", 2, 1)
craft("Hero", "gold_sword", 1)

# Step 9: Unequip Cursed Specter and equip Gold Sword
unequip("Hero", "weapon")
equip("Hero", "weapon", "gold_sword")

# Step 10: Move to Cultist Emperor and fight
move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")

move("Hero", 11, 7)
fight("Hero")
